name: @tootallnate/dxtk-font
description: Parser for DirectXTK SpriteFont binaries (`DXTKfont` magic) — the bitmap-atlas font format produced by Microsoft's MakeSpriteFont tool and consumed by SpriteFont at runtime. Decodes the glyph table and embedded texture (R8G8B8A8, B4G4R4A4, or BC2/DXT3) to RGBA8 pixels ready to render to a canvas.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
